_description: 影视视觉风格预设。生成短剧时可通过 style_id 或 style_name 指定。每个预设包含摄影机、镜头、胶片/滤镜等参数，会注入到 storyboard_config.json 和 AI 生成提示词中。

styles.name: Cinematic Film
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Panavision Sphero 65 and Hasselblad Lenses, Vision3 500T 5219, ND0.6, Diffusion Filter 1/4, cinematic film grain, shallow depth of field

styles.name: Anime Classic
styles.prompt_suffix: anime style, cel shading, vibrant colors, soft glow, Studio Ghibli inspired, hand-drawn aesthetic

styles.name: Cyberpunk Neon
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on RED Monstro 8K VV, cyberpunk neon lighting, Pro Mist 1/4 filter, high contrast, teal and orange color grading, rain-soaked reflections

styles.name: Chinese Ink Painting
styles.prompt_suffix: Chinese ink painting style, shuimo, traditional watercolor wash, flowing brushstrokes, muted earth tones with splashes of vermillion, misty atmosphere

styles.name: Korean Drama
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Sony VENICE 2, Korean drama aesthetic, warm soft lighting, shallow depth of field, golden hour glow, dreamy bokeh, pastel color palette

styles.name: Dark Thriller
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on ARRI ALEXA 65, Kodak Vision3 500T, dark thriller atmosphere, high contrast chiaroscuro lighting, desaturated cold tones, noir shadows, tension

styles.name: Vintage Hong Kong
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Kodak Vision3 500T, Cooke Anamorphic lens, vintage Hong Kong cinema style, warm tungsten lighting, film grain, anamorphic lens flare, nostalgic atmosphere

styles.name: Wuxia Epic
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Panavision Millennium DXL2, Kodak Vision3 250D, wuxia martial arts epic, sweeping landscapes, dramatic overhead crane shots, flowing fabrics, fog and mist

styles.name: Soft Romance
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Canon C500 Mark II, romantic soft focus, warm pastel tones, dreamy lens flare, cherry blossom petals, gentle backlight, intimate shallow depth of field

styles.name: Documentary Real
styles.prompt_suffix: shot on Sony FX6, documentary style, handheld camera, natural lighting, S-Cinetone color science, realistic skin tones, deep depth of field, raw and authentic
